PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --port 8000" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\Vibha Beria\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\jjm dashboard\\backend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAILED: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --port 8000" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\Vibha Beria\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\jjm dashboard\\backend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HEALTH: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $api = $r2.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $routes = $api.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object; Write-Host "ROUTES \($\($routes.Count\)\):"; $routes | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" } } catch { Write-Host "API spec fail: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force)
